name: openEuler sig-mate-desktop SIG
description: The MATE desktop environment is a continuation of GNOME2. It provides an intuitive and attractive desktop environment for Linux and other Unix-like operating systems.

name: openEuler sig-mate-desktop SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-mate-desktop SIG maintains 64 repositories in the Desktop and Graphics domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-mate-desktop SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The MATE desktop environment is a continuation of GNOME2. It provides an intuitive and attractive desktop environment for Linux and other Unix-like operating systems.. The SIG has 7 core members and maintains 64 repositories in the Desktop and Graphics domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-mate-desktop SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-mate-desktop SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-mate-desktop SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-mate-desktop SIG maintains 64 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-mate-desktop.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-mate-desktop SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-mate-desktop SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: liujiajie, liguoqiang, yangxianzhao. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
